name: 🌾 水稲 葉色診断（三重県版）
description: スマートフォンのカメラで、コシヒカリの葉色から追肥・穂肥の要否を診断します

icons.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 192 192'><rect fill='%232E7D32' width='192' height='192'/><text x='96' y='110' font-size='80' font-weight='bold' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🌾</text></svg>

data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 512 512'><rect fill='%232E7D32' width='512' height='512'/><text x='256' y='280' font-size='220' font-weight='bold' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🌾</text></svg>

screenshots.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 540 720'><rect fill='%23f5f5f5' width='540' height='720'/><rect fill='%232E7D32' width='540' height='100'/><text x='270' y='50' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>🌾 葉色診断</text><rect x='20' y='150' width='500' height='400' rx='10' fill='white' stroke='%23ddd' stroke-width='2'/><text x='270' y='300' font-size='18' font-weight='bold' fill='%23333' text-anchor='middle'>反射板を撮影</text><text x='270' y='400' font-size='16' fill='%23666' text-anchor='middle'>葉をアップで撮影</text><text x='270' y='450' font-size='16' fill='%23666' text-anchor='middle'>葉色板・SPAD値を表示</text></svg>
